sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this beat 'em up title

special_mechanics.name: Special Move
special_mechanics.description: Executed by pressing Attack and Jump buttons simultaneously (or dedicated third button). Each character has unique special move techniques

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Three playable characters with distinct movesets: Haggar (professional wrestling techniques), Maki (Bushin-ryū Ninjutsu), Carlos (martial arts with sword special move)

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters (speed values, gravity constants, acceleration rates) are documented. As a beat 'em up rather than a platformer, movement physics are not a primary design focus in available documentation.
